title: The Line is Never Finished
author: MintFace
excerpt: "The Line is never finished" has been a catchphrase of the community since 2022. As marketplaces shutter, The Line steps up a gear.
content:
"The Line is never finished" has been a catchphrase of the community since 2022. Many projects were shutting down back then and we wanted each other in the artist community to know that we were sticking around.

2026 feels like deja vu as now the swatch of marketplaces shutdown. As they shutter, The Line steps up a gear with a new token gated home for artists to hang out with each other in private, chat, share work amongst their peers.

The artist profiles are upgraded to show sales data live from the Ethereum blockchain and include a better bio about each artist.

Most importantly, the navigation is fast and simple so collectors can find artists that were here early and verify that they are still active.

There is more to come… lfffline!!!
